prompt: cinematic aerial shot of Tokyo at dusk, neon reflections on wet streets, long exposure

review.note: Scene specificity + wet-street lighting descriptor synergise well — reliable urban aerial pattern

prompt: aerial view of Sahara sand dunes at sunrise, long directional shadows, warm amber palette

review.note: Directional-light + terrain specificity produces repeatable composition

prompt: cinematic drone shot over Amazon rainforest canopy, morning mist rising, golden shafts of light

review.note: Atmospheric element (mist) adds depth without over-constraining output

prompt: aerial shot of city, tall buildings, sunset, dramatic, cinematic, photorealistic, 4k, ultra detailed

review.note: Keyword stacking without scene specificity — each generic modifier dilutes rather than focuses; output inconsistent across runs

prompt: dramatic studio portrait of an elderly woodworker, harsh side lighting, sawdust in the air, dark background

review.note: Lighting style + subject specificity + environmental detail (sawdust) produces strong mood — pattern scales to other craft subjects

prompt: soft natural light portrait of a young researcher at a desk, bookshelves behind, shallow depth of field

review.note: Natural-light descriptor + background context grounds scene without over-specifying subject

prompt: professional portrait of a woman, elegant, beautiful, studio lighting

review.note: Too generic — add lighting direction (Rembrandt vs butterfly), mood (editorial vs corporate), and environmental anchor to make reusable as a pattern

prompt: fluid simulation of crimson and gold ink dispersing in water, macro lens, high contrast black background

review.note: Material-physics anchor + specific palette + macro constraint is highly repeatable; model handles ink-in-water reliably

prompt: geometric tessellation of hexagons in muted earth tones, subtle depth variation, architectural scale

review.note: Precise geometric anchor with controlled palette works reliably; 'architectural scale' context keeps proportions consistent

prompt: abstract swirling colors, vibrant, psychedelic, energy, flowing, beautiful

review.note: Vague descriptors produce inconsistent results — needs a material anchor (oil paint, liquid, light) and compositional constraint (radial, layered) to become a reusable pattern

prompt: Scottish Highlands in autumn, overcast sky, a single stone cottage beside a loch, telephoto compression

review.note: Specific location + season + unique subject element (cottage) + lens characteristic elevates above generic landscape; telephoto compression reliably flattens depth

prompt: beautiful mountain landscape at sunset, dramatic sky, majestic peaks

review.note: No distinguishing elements — pattern too generic to produce repeatable signal; output varies wildly across seeds

prompt: peaceful ocean view, waves, horizon, golden hour, serene

review.note: Atmospheric modifiers without compositional specificity yield highly variable results — needs foreground element or vantage point to anchor composition

prompt: minimalist product shot of a glass water bottle on white marble, soft diffused studio lighting, clean reflection below

review.note: Background material + lighting type + reflection = reliable commercial pattern; works across product categories

prompt: top-down product flat lay of specialty coffee equipment on natural linen, soft morning window light, editorial style

review.note: Angle + material + lighting produces consistent editorial aesthetic but needs a primary subject constraint — full equipment array creates cluttered compositions

prompt: brutalist concrete library interior, shafts of natural light from skylights, long reading tables, monumental scale
failure_reason: Generation timed out after maximum retries

prompt: documentary portrait of a street musician, handheld camera aesthetic, shallow DOF, rain-soaked pavement
